message:
feat(tui): add effectiveness dashboard panel

Add EffectivenessPanel to display agent effectiveness metrics in the TUI
dashboard. Shows per-agent scores, trends, and recommendations.

Features:
- Per-agent score bars with color coding (green/yellow/orange/red)
- Trend arrows (improving/declining/stable)
- Sample count for data confidence
- Expandable detailed breakdown (completion/quality/efficiency)
- Recommendations section for underperforming agents
- Stable ordering (highest score first, alphabetical on tie)

Tests:
- 14 unit tests covering panel creation, data sorting, rendering,
  keybindings, and edge cases

Relates to: bd-16lm

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
